items.title: Trump in Davos, Netflix and Intel results on deck as earnings season ramps up: What to watch this week

items.title:
What to Expect in Markets This Week: Trump Davos Speech, MLK Holiday,
PCE Inflation, Netflix, Intel Earnings
items.description: Coming up: Trump speech at Davos, Martin Luther King Jr. holiday, PCE inflation report, GDP update, and earnings from Netflix, Intel, and more.
